---
title: "resolution_param_ext"
output: html_document
date: "2026-04-22"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r setup, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(Seurat)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tibble)
library(patchwork)
```

## Load Data

```{r}
infile  <- "/projectnb/ds596/projects/Team 9/scQC_project/colon_immune_raw.rds"
out_dir <- "/projectnb/ds596/projects/Team 9/scQC_project/extension/ddqc_resolution_params"
dir.create(out_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

seurat_obj <- readRDS(infile)
```

## QC Metrics

```{r}
if (!"percent.mt" %in% colnames(seurat_obj@meta.data)) {
  seurat_obj[["percent.mt"]] <- PercentageFeatureSet(seurat_obj, pattern = "^MT-")
}

ribo_genes <- grep("^RP[SL]", rownames(seurat_obj), value = TRUE, ignore.case = TRUE)

seurat_obj[["percent.ribo"]] <- if (length(ribo_genes) > 0) {
  PercentageFeatureSet(seurat_obj, features = ribo_genes)
} else {
  0
}
```

## Basic Filtering

```{r}
seu_prefilt <- subset(
  seurat_obj,
  subset = nFeature_RNA >= 100 & percent.mt <= 80
)
```

## Parameters

```{r}
resolutions <- c(0.4, 0.8, 1.3, 1.6, 2.0)


npcs_use <- 50
k_param <- 20
random_seed <- 29
ddqc_threshold <- 2.0

n_genes_lower_bound <- 200
percent_mito_upper_bound <- 10

results_list <- list()
```


# Loop

```{r}
for (res in resolutions) {
  
  set.seed(random_seed)
  cat("\nRunning resolution:", res, "\n")
  
  seu_cluster <- seu_prefilt
  
  # Preprocessing
  seu_cluster <- NormalizeData(seu_cluster, verbose = FALSE)
  seu_cluster <- FindVariableFeatures(seu_cluster, nfeatures = 2000, verbose = FALSE)
  seu_cluster <- ScaleData(seu_cluster, verbose = FALSE)
  seu_cluster <- RunPCA(seu_cluster, npcs = npcs_use, verbose = FALSE)
  
  seu_cluster <- FindNeighbors(seu_cluster, dims = 1:npcs_use, k.param = k_param)
  seu_cluster <- FindClusters(seu_cluster, resolution = res, algorithm = 1)
  seu_cluster <- RunUMAP(seu_cluster, dims = 1:20)
  
  ## -------- ddqc --------
  meta <- seu_cluster@meta.data %>%
    rownames_to_column("cell") %>%
    mutate(
      cluster = as.character(seurat_clusters),
      n_counts = nCount_RNA,
      n_genes = nFeature_RNA,
      percent_mito = percent.mt,
      percent_ribo = percent.ribo
    )
  
  cutoffs <- meta %>%
    group_by(cluster) %>%
    summarise(
      counts_median = median(n_counts, na.rm = TRUE),
      genes_median = median(n_genes , na.rm = TRUE),
      mito_median = median(percent_mito , na.rm = TRUE),
      ribo_median = median(percent_ribo , na.rm = TRUE),
      counts_mad = mad(n_counts, center = median(n_counts, na.rm = TRUE), constant = 1.4826, na.rm = TRUE),
      genes_mad = mad(n_genes, center = median(n_genes, na.rm = TRUE), constant = 1.4826, na.rm = TRUE),
      mito_mad = mad(percent_mito, center = median(percent_mito, na.rm = TRUE), constant = 1.4826, na.rm = TRUE),
      ribo_mad = mad(percent_ribo, center = median(percent_ribo, na.rm = TRUE), constant = 1.4826, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      n_counts_lower = pmax(0, counts_median - ddqc_threshold * counts_mad),
      n_counts_upper = counts_median + ddqc_threshold * counts_mad,
      n_genes_lower_raw = genes_median - ddqc_threshold * genes_mad,
      n_genes_upper = genes_median + ddqc_threshold * genes_mad,
      percent_mito_upper_raw = mito_median + ddqc_threshold * mito_mad,
      percent_ribo_upper = ribo_median + ddqc_threshold * ribo_mad,
      n_genes_lower = pmin(n_genes_lower_raw, n_genes_lower_bound),
      percent_mito_upper = pmax(percent_mito_upper_raw, percent_mito_upper_bound)
    )
  
  meta_labeled <- meta %>%
    left_join(cutoffs, by = "cluster") %>%
    mutate(
      keep =
        n_counts >= n_counts_lower &
        n_counts <= n_counts_upper &
        n_genes >= n_genes_lower &
        n_genes <= n_genes_upper &
        percent_mito <= percent_mito_upper &
        percent_ribo <= percent_ribo_upper,
      status = ifelse(keep, "Kept", "Removed")
    )
  
  seu_cluster$status <- meta_labeled$status[
    match(colnames(seu_cluster), meta_labeled$cell)
  ]
  
  cells_keep <- meta_labeled %>% filter(keep) %>% pull(cell)
  seu_ddqc <- subset(seu_prefilt, cells = cells_keep)
  
  ## -------- Post ddqc --------
  seu_ddqc <- NormalizeData(seu_ddqc)
  seu_ddqc <- FindVariableFeatures(seu_ddqc, nfeatures = 2000)
  seu_ddqc <- ScaleData(seu_ddqc)
  seu_ddqc <- RunPCA(seu_ddqc, npcs = npcs_use)
  seu_ddqc <- FindNeighbors(seu_ddqc, dims = 1:npcs_use)
  seu_ddqc <- FindClusters(seu_ddqc, resolution = res, algorithm = 1)
  seu_ddqc <- RunUMAP(seu_ddqc, dims = 1:20)
  
  # 
  # p_pre <- DimPlot(seu_cluster, reduction = "umap", label = TRUE) +
  #   ggtitle(paste("Pre-ddqc (res =", res, ")"))
  # 
  # p_post <- DimPlot(seu_ddqc, reduction = "umap", label = TRUE) +
  #   ggtitle(paste("Post-ddqc (res =", res, ")"))
  # 
  # ggsave(file.path(out_dir, paste0("UMAP_compare_res_", res, ".pdf")),
  #        p_pre | p_post, width = 12, height = 6, device = "pdf")
  # 
  # 
  # 
  # p_removed <- DimPlot(
  #   seu_cluster,
  #   reduction = "umap",
  #   group.by = "status",
  #   cols = c("grey80", "red"),
  #   pt.size = 0.3
  # ) + ggtitle(paste("Cells removed (res =", res, ")"))
  # 
  # ggsave(file.path(out_dir, paste0("removed_cells_res_", res, ".pdf")),
  #        p_removed, width = 7, height = 6, device = "pdf")
  # 
  # 
  # 
  # vln <- VlnPlot(
  #   seu_cluster,
  #   features = c("nFeature_RNA", "percent.mt"),
  #   pt.size = 0
  # ) + ggtitle(paste("QC metrics (pre-ddqc, res =", res, ")"))
  # 
  # ggsave(file.path(out_dir, paste0("qc_violin_res_", res, ".pdf")),
  #        vln, width = 10, height = 5, device = "pdf")
  # 
  # 
  
  results_list[[as.character(res)]] <- data.frame(
    resolution = res,
    cells_before = ncol(seu_prefilt),
    cells_after = ncol(seu_ddqc),
    frac_removed = (ncol(seu_prefilt) - ncol(seu_ddqc)) / ncol(seu_prefilt)
  )
}
```


```{r}

results_df <- do.call(rbind, results_list)

p_bar <- ggplot(results_df, aes(x = factor(resolution, levels = c(0.4, 0.8, 1.3, 1.6, 2.0)), 
                               y = frac_removed)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  labs(
    title = "Fraction of Cells Removed by ddqc",
    x = "Resolution",
    y = "Fraction Removed"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

ggsave(
  file.path(out_dir, "fraction_removed_vs_resolution.pdf"),
  p_bar,
  width = 7,
  height = 5
)

results_df

```
